title: gentianella austriaca subsp. neilreichii
intro: Gentianella austriaca subsp. neilreichii, also known as Neilreich's gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, Gentianaceae. The plant's roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gentianella austriaca subsp. neilreichii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
